name: 07_transient_gap_single_tick_does_not_fire
description: Adversarial: a fix that fires too eagerly (single missing MC tick triggers liquidation). A single cycle of MC absence (prob_beating goes None for ONE tick then returns) must NOT fire the stop unless EXIT_CONFIRM_TICKS consecutive qualifying ticks are seen. The ticks-below-stop counter and the 3-tick confirmation requirement is the guard.

sequence.description: MC absent for one tick, return below stop.
sequence.derivation: Magnitude: -2.0 <= -1.10 TRUE. MC sanity: None -> pass. Count: 0+1=1. Hit = (1 >= 3) = False. Single tick MUST NOT fire.

sequence.description: MC returns (prob_beating=30.0), return recovers above stop. Count must reset.
sequence.derivation: Magnitude: 0.5 <= -1.10 FALSE. Condition fails -> full reset to 0. MC returned; no fire.
